dublinCore.dc:title: 116 HR 9391 RH: Reimbursable Screening Services Program Extension Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Garbarino (for himself and Ms. Pou) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Homeland Security
Committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union and ordered to be printed

form.official-title: To authorize an extension and expansion of the reimbursable screening services program of the Transportation Security Administration, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Reimbursable Screening Services Program Extension Act of 2026.

section.header: Extension and expansion of reimbursable screening services program

subsection.text: Subsection (e) of section 225 of division A of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2019 (Public Law 116–6; 49 U.S.C. 44901 note), is amended by striking through fiscal year 2026 and inserting through fiscal year 2031.
Subsection (e) of section 225 of division A of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2019 is further amended by striking not more than eight and inserting not more than 14.

endorsement.action-desc: Committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union and ordered to be printed
